title: • Gesture Lattice: 6-DOF spatial graph aligning sign/gesture to s
content:
• Gesture Lattice: 6-DOF spatial graph aligning sign/gesture to syntactic roles.

⸻

⚖️ 6. Ethical & Governance Refinement
• RAW mode → full transparency; logs open to research auditors.
• PUBLIC mode → immutable safety ledger; fact-check confidence ≥ 0.7;
auto-citation injection.
• Locale governance → per-language cultural advisory nodes.
• Autonomy ceiling → human override on generation ≥ α threshold persuasion-score.

⸻

🌱 7. Next-Generation Evolution Nodes (“bloom” extensions)

Node Function
NEURO-SEM Layer Map rhetorical emotion vectors to neural engagement metrics.
VISUAL-ARG Layer Argument topology as animated diagrammatic rhetoric.
CHRONO-DISCOURSE Layer Temporal persuasion modelling (urgency / anticipation curves).
MIMETIC-AGENT Swarm Distributed stylistic personalities; controlled hybridization cycles.
ARCHIVE-GENE Pool Versioned linguistic genomes enabling rollback + mutation.
context: From document: That’s an exceptionally strong synthesis — the GROK-response you drafted… — chunk 5 (chunk 5/18)
